name: Joe Biden
subject: Respectfully asking you to give to our Biden-Harris Founding Donor Fund.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I don't enjoy asking for your money, but this moment in our campaign is a big deal. |
---
Peter,

I just wrapped my first grassroots fundraiser with Kamala Harris as my running mate. And Peter, I'm so proud of this team standing behind me.

As you know, I've been waging this battle for the soul of the nation for nearly a year and a half. But, with Kamala joining me on the ticket, I'm more fired up than ever before.

This is an important moment, and after all, that's what campaigns are all about: capitalizing on the big moments to build a winning movement.

Today, Peter, we're launching our Biden-Harris Founding Donor Fund, to seize the opportunity in front of us and kick-off our full ticket. I'm counting on every grassroots supporter to step up today and help create a surge of momentum to win this election by chipping in $5 right now. I don't enjoy asking for your money, but this moment in our campaign is a big deal.

[**Please, Peter, can Kamala and I count on your $5 donation today?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | **Biden-Harris Founding Donor Status for[Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")** **Founding Donor Status:** No, not a Biden-Harris Founding Donor yet. **Suggested Action:** [**Make your first $5 contribution to the Founding Donor Fund to activate your Biden-Harris Founding Donor membership »**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Peter, I know that one day your children and grandchildren will read in the history books about the final few months of this election.

Let's make sure that the concluding sentences say that the forces for democracy prevailed, and our campaign came out on top.

But Peter, that will only happen if Kamala and I have you by our side.

[**Pitch in what you can today to our Biden-Harris Founding Donor Fund and help us win the most important election of our lifetimes, and together we will write the next chapter of our American story:**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Biden-Harris-Founding-Donor-Fund**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.12_B4_foundingdonor_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for all you do.

_Joe Biden_
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1688/4082593495/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1687/4082593495/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1686/4082593495/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1685/4082593495/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1684/4082593495/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1683/4082593495/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1682/4082593495/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1681/4082593495/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1680/4082593495/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e177f/4082593495/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1682/4082593495/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e177e/4082593495/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e1681/4082593495/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb8e/1cd0ac28/16162788e/357e177d/4082593495/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Biden Picks Kamala
body:
A surprising pick? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Biden Picks Kamala. The Unconventions. And Biden Makes Another Racist Comment.](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-j/)
Last night, the Biden campaign confirmed he is choosing Senator Kamala Harris to be his running mate. To many this was no surprise. However, what is surprising is just a few months ago, in the Democratic debate, Harris confronted Biden about having worked with segregationists in the Senate and discussed her personal history with busing. In this week's blog I discuss Biden's selection, the upcoming national conventions for both parties and yet another racially insensitive comment from basement Joe! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Will They or Won't They Debate? ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-d/)
The mainstream press is at it again, highlighting polls that favor Joe Biden and practically declaring Biden the winner of the upcoming presidential election. Many Trump supporters believe that the great equalizer will be face-to-face debates, however, many in the media are already casting doubt on these already scheduled debates. In this week's blog, I discuss if these debates will actually happen and I have a follow-up from last week's blog about what happens if the Democrats win the trifecta of the House, Senate and Presidency. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [If the Democrats Win](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-u/)
We're a little less than 100 days from this year's election. People are saying, this could be the most important election of our lifetime. A bit cliche? Not this time. The reality is, the House, the Senate and the Presidency are all at stake. In this week's blog, I discuss what will happen if the Democrats sweep the election. God help us. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Major Threats to the US Across the Globe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this week's blog, I thought I would discuss the major challenges the United States faces across the globe. As a senior member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, I would say that the five most problematic nations are Russia, China, Iran, North Korea and Venezuela. And in a little more than three months, the American people must decide whether it's true or not - that Joe Biden has been wrong on every major foreign policy issue in recent memory. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhufit-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

body:
Are you ready to take your commitment to Team SJ to the next level?

| | | **VOLUNTEER WITH TEAM SJ! **
Check out virtual ways to support our campaign and sign up today!
---
| [VOLUNTEER ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7948/27c6da69/2b2ad1de/12fe08b/2807613322/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://www.mobilize.us/sarajacobsforca/")
---
Are you ready to take your commitment to Team SJ to the next level? We're looking for volunteers to participate in virtual phone banking to spread the word about Sara and our campaign.

While we're sad we can't fill our offices with volunteers and hold in-person events any time soon, we won't let that stop us from growing our grassroots network virtually.

Phone banks are one of the best ways to reach voters -- and we are having more success than ever because folks are spending more time at home and are more willing to have meaningful conversations about Sara's vision and positive message.

Setting yourself up on our phone bank platform is easy, secure, and flexible. So what are you waiting for? _**[Sign up to volunteer for Team SJ today!](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7948/27c6da69/2b2ad1de/12fe08b/2807613322/VEsF/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://www.mobilize.us/sarajacobsforca/")**_

Thanks for your support,

Amy Kuhn (Team SJ Campaign Manager)

P.S. If you live in CA-53, you can also swing by one of our three offices to pick up a yard sign! We are doing contact-free office hours Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays from 5-8pm and Saturdays from 11am-5pm. Email _**[getinvolved@sarajacobsforca.com](mailto:getinvolved@sarajacobsforca.com?subject=Sign%20Pick%20Up)**_ for more information.

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f6/18e32a7f/4dc56fdb/7b2100bf/3838120941/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f6/18e32a7f/4dc56fdb/7b2100bc/3838120941/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f6/18e32a7f/4dc56fdb/7b2100bd/3838120941/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f6/18e32a7f/4dc56fdb/7b2100b9/3838120941/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f6/18e32a7f/4dc56fdb/7b2100bb/3838120941/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f6/18e32a7f/4dc56fdb/7b2100b2/3838120941/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: Joe Biden
subject: My Running Mate Selection, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I need someone working alongside me who is smart, tough, and ready to lead. |
---
Folks --

You make a lot of important decisions as president. But the first one is who you select to be your Vice President. I've decided that Kamala Harris is the best person to help me take this fight to Donald Trump and Mike Pence and then to lead this nation starting in January 2021.

[I'd like to tell you why, but first I'm going to ask you to add your name and welcome Kamala to our team.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e1485/2761893524/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-welcome-to-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

These aren't normal times. For the first time in our history, we're facing three historic crises -- all at the same time. We're facing the worst pandemic in 100 years. The worst economic crisis since the Great Depression. The most powerful calls for racial justice in a generation. And we have a president who has both failed to lead on the virus -- costing lives and decimating our economy -- and fanned the flames of hate and division.

I need someone working alongside me who is smart, tough, and ready to lead. Kamala is that person.

I need someone who understands the pain that so many people in our nation are suffering. Whether they've lost their job, their business, a loved one to this virus. This president says he "doesn't want to be distracted by it." He doesn't understand that taking care of the people of this nation -- all the people -- isn't a distraction -- it's the job. Kamala understands that.

I need someone who understands that we are in a battle for the soul of this nation. And that if we're going to get through these crises -- we need to come together and unite for a better America. Kamala gets that.

If I'm President, I'm committed to making things better -- not just in the short term, but sustainably, structurally, and permanently. We won't have time to delay. I need a partner who can help deliver on those promises, and quickly.

I was privileged to serve this nation for two terms as Vice President alongside President Obama, a man of extraordinary character who I believe will go down in history as one of our great presidents. So, I know a thing or two about being Vice President. More than anything, I know it can't be a political decision. It has to be a governing decision. If the people of this nation entrust me and Kamala with the office of President and Vice President for the next four years, we're going to inherit a nation in crisis, a nation divided, and a world in disarray. We won't have a minute to waste.

That's what led me to Kamala Harris.

As a United States Senator from California, Kamala represents the biggest state in the union. She's been one of the toughest and most effective Senators on two of the most important committees in the Senate -- Intelligence and Judiciary. Two committees that have directly dealt with some of the most important issues facing this nation at home and around the world.

She sits on the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, where she deals with the nation's most sensitive threats.

We've all watched her hold the Trump administration accountable for its corruption, stand up to a Justice Department that's run amok, and be a powerful voice against their extreme nominations.

She's been a leader on criminal justice and marriage equality. And she has focused like a laser on the racial disparities as a result of the coronavirus.

As California's Attorney General, she led one of the biggest legal departments in the nation -- where she was a powerful advocate for people in taking on the big banks and protecting women and kids from abuse. She's delivered billions in settlement money to consumers, taking on companies for fraud, pollution and abuse.

I first met Kamala through my son Beau. They were both Attorneys General at the same time. He had enormous respect for her and her work. I thought a lot about that as I made this decision. There is no one's opinion I valued more than Beau's and I'm proud to have Kamala standing with me on this campaign.

Her record of accomplishment -- fighting tooth and nail for what's right -- is why I'm choosing her. There is no door Kamala won't knock on, no stone she'll leave unturned, if it means making life better -- _for the people_.

[So join me in welcoming Kamala Harris to our team.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e1485/2761893524/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-welcome-to-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

She will wake up every day -- like I will -- thinking about how to make life better for people. How to rebuild our country back better. How to make it more just. How to win the next fight in the battle for the soul of this nation.

Because that's what the Presidency -- and the Vice Presidency -- is. It's a duty to care: for you, for all of us. This will be the fight of our administration, and there's no better partner that I could have asked for.

Thanks for everything,

-Joe | [DONATE](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=&amounts=,,,&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e1483/2761893524/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e1482/2761893524/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e1481/2761893524/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e1480/2761893524/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e157b/2761893524/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e157a/2761893524/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e157d/2761893524/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e1579/2761893524/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e157c/2761893524/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb88/1cd0ac28/16298fca4/357e1578/2761893524/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

clean_body: I need someone working alongside me who is smart, tough, and ready to lead. | Folks -- You make a lot of important decisions as president. But the first one is who you select to be your Vice President. I've decided that Kamala Harris is the best person to help me take this fight to Donald Trump and Mike Pence and then to lead this nation starting in January 2021. "" These aren't normal times. For the first time in our history, we're facing three historic crises -- all at the same time. We're facing the worst pandemic in 100 years. The worst economic crisis since the Great Depression. The most powerful calls for racial justice in a generation. And we have a president who has both failed to lead on the virus -- costing lives and decimating our economy -- and fanned the flames of hate and division. I need someone working alongside me who is smart, tough, and ready to lead. Kamala is that person. I need someone who understands the pain that so many people in our nation are suffering. Whether they've lost their job, their business, a loved one to this virus. This president says he "doesn't want to be distracted by it." He doesn't understand that taking care of the people of this nation -- all the people -- isn't a distraction -- it's the job. Kamala understands that. I need someone who understands that we are in a battle for the soul of this nation. And that if we're going to get through these crises -- we need to come together and unite for a better America. Kamala gets that. If I'm President, I'm committed to making things better -- not just in the short term, but sustainably, structurally, and permanently. We won't have time to delay. I need a partner who can help deliver on those promises, and quickly. I was privileged to serve this nation for two terms as Vice President alongside President Obama, a man of extraordinary character who I believe will go down in history as one of our great presidents. So, I know a thing or two about being Vice President. More than anything, I know it can't be a political decision. It has to be a governing decision. If the people of this nation entrust me and Kamala with the office of President and Vice President for the next four years, we're going to inherit a nation in crisis, a nation divided, and a world in disarray. We won't have a minute to waste. That's what led me to Kamala Harris. As a United States Senator from California, Kamala represents the biggest state in the union. She's been one of the toughest and most effective Senators on two of the most important committees in the Senate -- Intelligence and Judiciary. Two committees that have directly dealt with some of the most important issues facing this nation at home and around the world. She sits on the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, where she deals with the nation's most sensitive threats. We've all watched her hold the Trump administration accountable for its corruption, stand up to a Justice Department that's run amok, and be a powerful voice against their extreme nominations. She's been a leader on criminal justice and marriage equality. And she has focused like a laser on the racial disparities as a result of the coronavirus. As California's Attorney General, she led one of the biggest legal departments in the nation -- where she was a powerful advocate for people in taking on the big banks and protecting women and kids from abuse. She's delivered billions in settlement money to consumers, taking on companies for fraud, pollution and abuse. I first met Kamala through my son Beau. They were both Attorneys General at the same time. He had enormous respect for her and her work. I thought a lot about that as I made this decision. There is no one's opinion I valued more than Beau's and I'm proud to have Kamala standing with me on this campaign. Her record of accomplishment -- fighting tooth and nail for what's right -- is why I'm choosing her. There is no door Kamala won't knock on, no stone she'll leave unturned, if it means making life better -- for the people. "" She will wake up every day -- like I will -- thinking about how to make life better for people. How to rebuild our country back better. How to make it more just. How to win the next fight in the battle for the soul of this nation. Because that's what the Presidency -- and the Vice Presidency -- is. It's a duty to care: for you, for all of us. This will be the fight of our administration, and there's no better partner that I could have asked for. Thanks for everything, -Joe | "" | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: Voting is not enough. Get in the fight!
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A941)

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A981)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Welcome to the 2020 election nightmare! Bogus ballot requests, mass mail failures, and blatant lies from politicos across the country are playing out in real time.

Our predictions for a massive election failure are coming true. Over the coming days, you will witness an unprecedented level of cheating, lying, and fraud.

As we approach early voting, Election Day, and the inevitable counting trickery, the future of American elections stands in the balance.

True the Vote is taking action.

We are a citizen-led army training and preparing to fight. But [we need your financial support](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A950) to continue our critical mission of protecting election integrity this November and beyond.

Here are four ways that we are working to mobilize millions of volunteers:

1. [Empowering Citizens](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A953) \- We are crowdsourcing local information about how to become an election worker through the "Call Your County" project. As information comes in, we validate and post it online in a shareable format to make it easier for citizens to get involved in their local election process.

2. [Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A954) \- We are launching new training programs to equip citizens to serve as election workers and to expose and deter election fraud. Check out the [Election Observer Basic Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A954), [Election Integrity 101](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A954), [Poll Watcher Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A954), and [Signature Verification Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A954).

3. [Recruiting & Enrolling](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A959) \- We are actively working to recruit and enroll citizens to serve at the polls in the 2020 general election. Election worker positions include: presiding and alternate judges who manage the poll books and issue ballots; election clerks and greeters who assist the judges; early voting ballot board members; signature verification committee members; and central counting station personnel.

4. [Reporting](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A960) \- We are encouraging citizens to report problems and share their stories so we can help expose - and stop - election fraud or manipulation.

We will have eyes everywhere during the General Election. We will keep close watch on the mass mail failures. Our lawyers will be ready to intervene when the law is broken.

But we need help.

We need your time.

We need your [financial support.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A950)

---
| | [ Help Us Defend Your Vote ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=96A141A14A943)
---
| | Voting is not enough this year. Get in the fight.
God bless you. God bless America.

Onward!

---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

P.S. Listen to your favorite talk show hosts about an amazing new recruiting program called 10 for 20! True the Vote is the election integrity and ballot security partner!

---
| | |
---
| | Donations made to True the Vote are tax deductible.
True the Vote is a 501c3 nonprofit organization, Federal Tax I.D. #27-2860095.

---

Friend,

It is the honor of my life to serve our Country, alongside President Trump, as the 48th Vice President of the United States.

I see that Joe Biden has picked Senator Kamala Harris as his VP nominee.

That pick shows that Biden and the Democrat Party have been overtaken by the Radical Left. Given their promises of higher taxes, open borders, socialized medicine and Abortion on Demand, it’s no surprise he chose Senator Harris, she is weak on crime and refuses to put America First.

From the very first day of this Administration, President Trump has set our Nation on a path to freedom and opportunity. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris would set America on the path of SOCIALISM and DECLINE.

For the sake of American strength, jobs, law and order, our lives, and our liberties, we must defeat this radical duo on Election Day. The stakes have never been higher, and we need your help to send a message that this is YOUR Country, NOT THEIRS.

For the NEXT HOUR, all contributions will be 600%-MATCHED!

body:

Friend,

As excited as we are to know the top of the Democratic ticket now, we have to stay focused on what lies ahead. We can’t afford any missteps or missed opportunities.
With Covid-19 complicating things, it is imperative that we communicate effectively with voters and ensure that everyone can have their voices heard without putting their health at risk. We are making calls and sending out information round the clock. Will you offer your support today by making a donation? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Voting out Donald Trump and his corrupt GOP is the most important vote we may ever make in our lives. If ever there was a time to invest in Democrats, it is now.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP

name: Team Sri
subject: Join Team Sri's Weekend of Action!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.12_skfc_b1_ND&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.12_skfc_b1_ND&amount=5]
Hi Friend,
We have 82 days till Election Day, which means we need all hands on deck to turn TX-22 blue and put Sri Preston Kulkarni into office! In order to do this, we need to talk to every voter in the district and ensure they are voting for Sri! Join us THIS weekend for a virtual Weekend of Action! We will be starting off the weekend on Friday night with our kick-off event at 6PM CT. CLICK HERE TO JOIN US! [https://www.mobilize.us/sriforcongress/event/299799/]
We will be hosting virtual phonebanks by area throughout the weekend! Go to Mobilize.us/SriforCongress [https://www.mobilize.us/sriforcongress/] to find your volunteer neighbors and phonebank with them. If you're outside the district, please feel free to join us virtually!
Excited to win with you,
Team Sri!
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.
Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.12_skfc_b1_ND&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.12_skfc_b1_ND&amount=5]
Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.12_skfc_b1_ND&amount=5]
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

name: Elias Duncan
subject: do you have a second?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We've fallen dangerously behind this month. |
---
Friend -- it's Elias, Jon Ossoff's Digital Director here in Georgia.

Something's come up and I'm hoping you can help:

name: Sandy Smith
subject: We can't let them win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gzpTprShS3Nxmng&b=77dqWKRUH8Oy.5cs0L.G7w)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief.
I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed.
_**Herman Cain is a hero - and his American Dream is one for the history books**_. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats.
**_Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. _**
But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred:
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gzpTprShS3Nxmng&b=77dqWKRUH8Oy.5cs0L.G7w)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gzpTprShS3Nxmng&b=77dqWKRUH8Oy.5cs0L.G7w)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gzpTprShS3Nxmng&b=77dqWKRUH8Oy.5cs0L.G7w)
---

**_We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. _**

Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century.

_What can we learn from this?_

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief. I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed. Herman Cain is a hero - and his American Dream is one for the history books. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats. Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred: We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ihFx.w1pZF6OuRU&b=0.RdZUseUGZnCJWushL4Iw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ihFx.w1pZF6OuRU&b=0.RdZUseUGZnCJWushL4Iw

Joe Biden has gone off the rails so many times, I question his mental health.

Just a few months ago, he said that if a black person didn't vote for him, "you ain't black!"

Where does he get this stuff???

His most recent slur? Black people all think the same:

Amid the fallout from comments by former vice president and presumptive Democratic presidential nominee Joe Biden about a lack of diversity of thought and heritage within the African American community, some worry that a pattern of blunders could impact support within the Black community.

Biden drew criticism on Thursday when he compared the diversity of African American and Latino communities at a pretaped virtual talk with the National Association of Black Journalists and the National Association of Hispanic Journalists.

"What you all know, but most people don't know. Unlike the African American community, with notable exceptions, the Latino community is incredibly diverse community with incredibly different attitudes about different things," Biden said. "You go to Florida you find a very different attitude about immigration in certain places than you do when you're in Arizona. So it's a very different, a very diverse community."

"To diminish those cultures and the richness of those cultures is such a wildly ignorant thing to do and insulting on so many levels," said Williams, who is the son of immigrants from Grenada. "But I wish I was surprised."

Joe Biden and Darren Soto share the same mindset. They believe that just because a certain minority group may have voted for you in the past, they will do so in perpetuity, no matter how far you may go astray.

Believe your eyes, neither Joe Biden nor Darren Soto shares your values, no matter what the color of your skin.

Folks, no one’s perfect. Heaven knows I’ve fallen so many times I’ve got holes in the knees of my jeans.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ihFx.w1pZF6OuRU&b=0.RdZUseUGZnCJWushL4Iw

But, I implore you, don’t be fooled by the identity politics of Joe Biden and Darren Soto.

He votes with Pelosi and the Squad 93% of the time!

Vote your values!

I’m just a regular guy. I am not a political bigshot. But 14 months ago I renewed my military oath to protect and defend the Constitution of the United States from all enemies foreign and domestic. I’ll follow my Conscience, first and foremost. protect the Constitution, and my neighbors, always!

Joe Biden's racial theories will become our reality- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ihFx.w1pZF6OuRU&b=0.RdZUseUGZnCJWushL4Iw

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ihFx.w1pZF6OuRU&b=0.RdZUseUGZnCJWushL4Iw

President Trump doesn't put us in categories like that. He's not just the President of one or another group of Americans, like the Democrats are. He's the President of ALL Americans!

We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ihFx.w1pZF6OuRU&b=0.RdZUseUGZnCJWushL4Iw
?

Image

I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ihFx.w1pZF6OuRU&b=0.RdZUseUGZnCJWushL4Iw

I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

Can you help me?

This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Democrats Blocked the Vote
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_blocked_the_vote&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I wish I had better news to deliver this morning, but unfortunately there's still more work to be done for us to finally remove Walz' Emergency Powers. We know the Democrats in the House are starting to get worried about losing seats over this issue. Our targeting of vulnerable Democrats appears to be the right course. But Speaker Hortman is making the calculation that they can hold on to the powers for at least another month. **So yesterday, Hortman blocked us and didn't even allow a clean vote on the resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers.** What a shame! The good news for us is that we didn't lose a vote. Four democrats are still voting the right way. But the path to getting the other five will be even greater now. **One of the five Democrats is leftist Brad Tabke of Shakopee. Tabke got lucky in 2018 when the Blue Wave delivered 18 seats to the Democrats. But his district is likely to go back Republican.** Did you know our own candidate**Erik Mortensen** prevailed in Tuesday's primary? Erik will take on Brad Tabke in the November election and the stakes couldn't be bigger. [](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=kZuFY8l3J9G8vE1AIGepPYEFKLf-KWVS7hi3lRQyus8&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_blocked_the_vote&n=2) Erik is a small business man, a husband, a father of two and a true fighter for liberty. He's been active in the fight to restore our liberties against Walz' illegal use of emergency powers and will make Walz' powers an issue in his campaign to unseat Brad Tabke.
## [LEARN MORE ABOUT ERIK MORTENSEN](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=kZuFY8l3J9G8vE1AIGepPYEFKLf-KWVS7hi3lRQyus8&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_blocked_the_vote&n=3)
Democrats like Brad Tabke need to start paying attention to what's in store for them. If they continue to ignore the will of their voters and constituents, they'll get kicked to the curb on November 3rd! Action 4 Liberty will not give up on this fight. It's important that we continue building for September's Special Session because Walz will inevitably extend the emergency again. Visit **[www.action4liberty.com](http://www.action4liberty.com?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_blocked_the_vote&n=4)** to stay informed on the battle. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_blocked_the_vote&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_blocked_the_vote&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_blocked_the_vote&n=7), software for leaders.

| | Peter -- My staff has been analyzing our path to victory, looking at Texas demographics, polling, and past trends, and **[we can win with your help.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e51/7f51f7bc/434e7fe0/4ef7f539/311999531/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4ODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200813.1nd__1889__&amount=10")**

Here's what we need to do:
* Energize Democratic support in every corner of Texas, with down ballot candidates turning out voters all across the state.
* Reach out to key swing voters who have realized that Sen. Cornyn is only out for himself, not our fellow Texans.
* Get our message out to the over 34% of voters who are undecided in this election. Over half of voters either disapprove of Sen. Cornyn or don't know who he is after 18 years in the Senate, so we have a lot of potential supporters.
* Raise over $100,000 more before our mid-month deadline (**[help us out and donate here>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e51/7f51f7bc/434e7fe0/4ef7f539/311999531/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4ODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200813.1nd__1889__&amount=10")**).

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Republican obstructionism
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHuL0X8sVPI_wXesG20K-S0YB69F64-7S3xO1TM0-ms=/nOXqbmzCu_8tc-0goKQLauxxFaPxMrR7BVTvylMmvJY=?refcode=081320SMH)
| | Friend, During my time in public service, I've never seen such reprehensible behavior as I witnessed yesterday in the Minnesota Senate. Republicans took a swipe at Governor Walz and ousted his strong and effective Commissioner of Labor and Industry with no notice.**Senate Republicans can equivocate all they want, but there is no way to escape the fact that they ousted Commissioner Leppink out of pure spite.** During the legislative session, Commissioner Leppink aced Senate Republicans in budget negotiations, giving us the strongest wage theft law in the country - protecting workers across the state. They've had a bone to pick with her ever since. **The Republican House Minority Leader even described it as "executing a prisoner****" yesterday on Twitter. **This is the latest and most extreme example of Minnesota Republicans choosing to be vindictive at the expense of the people they are supposed to be serving. Republicans are intent on playing politics instead of following science and data in responding to the COVID pandemic. They have continually attempted to restrict Governor Walz's ability to respond to the pandemic on behalf of Minnesotans, and are now blocking one of his administration's top officials from doing her job. Minnesota Republicans are in lockstep with Donald Trump, choosing petty politics instead of helping Minnesotans. Will you contribute to our campaign today to make sure this cruel act against an effective woman leader doesn't go unanswered? [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHuL0X8sVPI_wXesG20K-S0YB69F64-7S3xO1TM0-ms=/nOXqbmzCu_8tc-0goKQLauxxFaPxMrR7BVTvylMmvJY=?refcode=081320SMH) Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHuL0X8sVPI_wXesG20K-S0YB69F64-7S3xO1TM0-ms=/nOXqbmzCu_8tc-0goKQLauxxFaPxMrR7BVTvylMmvJY=?refcode=081320SMH)

body:
This fund will help us kick off our efforts to elect the Biden-Harris ticket |

| **_" Pitch in what you can today to our Biden-Harris Founding Donor Fund and help us win the most important election of our lifetimes, and together we will write the next chapter of our American story."_**
---

Peter --

Now that Kamala Harris has joined the campaign as Joe Biden's running mate, we have our full ticket to elect the next President and Vice President of the United States of America!

But Peter, as we officially begin the general election against Donald Trump and Mike Pence, we know there is a lot we have to do between now and November 3rd.

**That's why last night, Joe Biden emailed you to announce our Founding Donors Fund.**

Like Joe said, this fund will help us kick off our efforts to elect the Biden-Harris ticket, and make sure we can reach every single voter we need to make sure Democrats up and down the ballot win in November.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb98/1cd0ac28/162b201c9/357e1260/3353820392/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

It’s time to send him home. We hope you’ll join us at our unity event Saturday, August 15th from 3:00pm to 4:00pm CDT — [**you can RSVP by clicking here to make a contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18671084/235977938/-1898641697?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200812_Unity_U1_X1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDM4ODI4ZS04ZmRkLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m4WqmpZz0B-w2i1iIL_y0c8adcrWCdbC0fEKiVka9vc=) or you can contact Nick Merlino at nick@siegelfortexas.org or (786) 483-0344. | | | [RSVP! →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18671085/235977939/-1898641697?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200812_Unity_U1_X1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDM4ODI4ZS04ZmRkLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m4WqmpZz0B-w2i1iIL_y0c8adcrWCdbC0fEKiVka9vc=)

Recent polls show that we're the most competitive race in Iowa, so we know the bulk of that will be spent right here. **[We have to make sure these ads don't drown out Rita's message. Donate $10 to help us level the playing field and keep Iowa's most competitive district in hands that will protect Medicare, Social Security, and bring people together. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jaub4bNHBzrsGtc_zefDNugwK2Y6_7t_QRXTtROFHc8=/riEuS8MQlC4TtX1N26FRMLMOJS3cucunmI8RG5Q08Eg=?refcode=200813-email&amount=10)** The Congressional Leadership Fund is spending millions of their dark money dollars to influence key races where they need to take back power in 2020. subject: I’m passionate about this
body:
My dad is the most decorated living graduate of The Citadel, and he literally wrote the Ranger Field Manual for the U.S. Army. | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/im-passionate-about-this?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=45f8db14e2&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=739cdca535&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friend,

There’s nothing more important to me than taking care of our veterans and supporting the brave men and women who serve our country on the frontlines of the fight for freedom.

**Our troops give everything they have to keep us safe and free — we have an obligation to make sure they are taken care of when they come home.**

And to be frank — we’re not getting the job done. Our government has fallen short time and time again when it comes to taking care of those who have served.

**We need to do more to support our veterans and active military.**

[**Stand with our veterans and military families >>>>>**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=02ef6db417&e=f1831b4ca2)

_This issue is incredibly personal to me. My dad is the most decorated living graduate of The Citadel, and he literally wrote the Ranger Field Manual for the U.S. Army._

>From a young age, he instilled in me the importance of service, love of country, and loyalty to those who put everything on the line in the name of our country and in defense of our freedom.

_I also attended The Citadel, South Carolina’s military college, and many of my classmates are serving right now. Most of my family members are active duty or veterans — military culture has been one of the strongest influences on my life._

**My family story and experience at The Citadel ingrained in me an incredibly deep level of respect and admiration for our military and those who choose to serve. The sacrifices made by our men and women in uniform and their families are unparalleled and we need to do what we can to share their burden.**

That’s why I’ve made taking care of our veterans one of my top priorities — I was a proud sponsor of legislation that established a Department of Veterans’ Affairs in South Carolina.

I will never forget the service and sacrifice of my family and other military families across our country. When I get to Washington, D.C., I will always be their strongest advocate and will think of them first.

Will you join me in supporting our veterans and military families? Add your name below to stand with me.

_[**Stand with our veterans and military families >>>>>**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=95d1dd7b69&e=f1831b4ca2)_

Thank you,

Nancy Mace

| Derek, we are meeting our voter contact goals and making sure every Granite State Republican is ready and prepared to vote this fall. If we're going to continue supporting our volunteer voter contact efforts and help **_Get Out The Vote_** for Republicans this fall, [we need to hit our goal of raising $5,000 by midnight tonight.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg2OTEwNzk3MDI3MjE4NTAyJmM9aTF5NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODcxNzgxMzkmZD1qMHMzcDFt.cyxhQQBUqGbN9tqJdN2E-xmcUKVuVdcxninYmNbiRso) This election in New Hampshire is going to come down to every single vote cast, and [we need to make sure we have the resources to get Republicans and Granite State independent voters out to vote.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg2OTEwNzk3MDI3MjE4NTAyJmM9aTF5NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODcxNzgxNDImZD1kNHA0djd4.ahjTUXWQjeZgNsdyQ8Ou7QYcXYiLLjGGboTUt8iDQJM) **Tens of thousands of Granite Staters** stayed home in 2016 when we lost crucial races by just a few thousand votes - we're laser focused on [getting those voters out](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg2OTEwNzk3MDI3MjE4NTAyJmM9aTF5NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODcxNzgxNDUmZD1qM201eTVz.gY8MonmZkFb9k568KSe3gRhjjZpl566GUILX0oQxYQI) this year and delivering the Granite State for President Trump and Republicans up and down the ballot. name: Molly Keenan
subject: Our opponent compared himself to Rosa Parks.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is out of control.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu) Friend, Jay's opponent -- Loren Culp -- compared himself to Rosa Parks and compared law enforcement who enforce gun laws to Nazis. **I wish I were joking._I'm not_. The last time we didn't take a candidate like this seriously, he became President of the United States. We can't make that mistake here: [We need to raise $25,000 by midnight tomorrow to prepare for the fight ahead against Loren. Will you donate $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10679?t=4&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10680?t=5&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10681?t=6&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu)

| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10682?t=7&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu)
---

---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10684?t=9&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10679?t=10&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu)
---
In a recent interview after his primary win, Loren Culp told _The Seattle Times_ that because he refused to enforce the voter-approved measure that raised the age to buy semi-automatic rifles in Washington state from 18 to 21, he is similar to civil rights leader Rosa Parks in refusing to abide by "unfair" laws.
And the law enforcement officials who enforce those laws? He compared them to military officials in Nazi Germany who "arrested Jews and put them in concentration camps because it's the law."
In one interview, he somehow both compared himself to a historic civil rights activist and law enforcement officers to genocidal war criminals.
When we heard Donald Trump say absurd and offensive things like this back in 2016, we felt sure he'd lose. The last four years are a testament to why we cannot take any election for granted -- and it's why we need to step up now.
**The Republican Governors Association has millions to spend and would love to help elect a Donald Trump clone in Washington state.[Help fight back with grassroots support: Help raise $25,000 by tomorrow at midnight by donating $5 or more right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10679?t=11&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu)**
Thanks,
Molly
Molly Keenan
Campaign Manager
Inslee for Washington
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10679?t=12&akid=8122%2E868730%2EaLhyYu)

Peter,

Do you know what’s happening in America’s cities?
* _In the city of**Portland** , there has been nonstop mob violence where police offices are being attacked for **70 DAYS STRAIGHT**!_
* _In the city of**Chicago** , looters and rioters have **PILLAGED** and **DESTROYED** recovering businesses Downtown. _
* _In our backyard of**New York City** , residents are fleeing after Bill de Blasio defunded the NYPD by **$1 BILLION** and allowed chaos to slowly consume the city! _

**All while violence and chaos are happening, what are Democrat politicians doing? Either denying it’s happening or actively caving to the mob.** The left will allow this violence to move into our backyard. We can’t allow Long Island to be the next! This is why we must choose this November.

Peter, do you want leaders who will prioritize small businesses and job growth, or do we want leaders who stand with the mob? **[What do you support, JOBS or MOBS?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b77d18e1367d4a3680ce1dd888e38639&_e=9EoMCUZRLegl4JJa37A7KZUfrjc70NsmirdYddnL8FlpI2DNxwJKao45tC_UUPiuEMANfkJ4xL7OUddCPesuR1YrVFB1m5ZiEkNuDu3bvmOA4o-LP_K2Sh6nGkFfG855KzmN8gixSr-GeIp9bwk-1eKLKICiGleBCBwzVnxg3JMyx10Ahl2TdKZX8RyPLDfnI6C483iVqh7FLw3dx1nadiiy38NdNnLd1RGyCIj796APyspRIvfJr3Tp-yvHQpIFDe5gOGMF9X40kaHoF92oPVAi2PVdljBgLosNOY6gyD0Bn0qKSTUIUViyLXQF0DstCgvRjGRGbzSXByrhEDTTsgANzNA-LPwLLGGC3Gs9lWhBL694xL1DAXd97efzEi67yfgi9LLBsDqPlN_NjHSpwI_qziVNLVUG7FlUZ_9AZTeJicaB7hE-Avf6__duenRX) **

subject: Reminder: Sign up for a #TeamDani training this weekend!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/39a09862f4ab/reminder-sign-up-for-a-teamdani-training-this-weekend?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, #TeamDani!

I wanted to send over a reminder to sign up for a training session this weekend if you haven't already! **These training sessions will be crucial to making sure that we hit our voter contact goals, and get our message out to the voters who need to hear it. **

We've come so far on this campaign because of your tremendous support and amazing work on our behalf, and now we need you to help us finish the job! We're going to send Dani to Congress - but only if we all work together.

So make sure to [sign up for a training session](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=cb94ef92e8&e=140a9b81e7) because **we need your help to make sure we win this race. **

Let's finish this journey together, so we can celebrate on election night!

David McCarver
Campaign Manager

Friend,

**This isn’t your average election year – and we can’t afford to treat it like one.**

The Left is fighting to implement a radical, dangerous, socialist vision for America, and we have less than three months to stop it from taking root.

_Here’s what their vision for America looks like:_

**☭ Defunded police departments**
**☭ $1 trillion Green New Deal **
**☭ Medicare for All – whether they want it or not!**
**☭ Torn-down statues of American heroes**
**☭ Open borders**
[**RUSH A DONATION TO STOP THEIR AGENDA**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d77e0d339c7f4ecf8c64f3e055bd67cf&_e=cEMORzMDdU0T3_1Zm_lYsVJvmTB6owOVxK2-i3gZsXrIXxZVwST7IKXUKESZ6rb1F0upyuzb50dXbAJq94DZRkoeFy5faj-n2CzrWAtl-mHf8d-z_FN0-U0FoMlnqsmppXzM_5-1LMGnk4S-95UtdtTUAwt9_ptjxY2mTtBsXLDTqlC2S5br0BvoTxqkaXE_-kX7TwP7AUlyVTG_VQtWEOk1UAzBq16b_fZuk0R20D8skSMPDrN4okqwa219vWlh0y3UupeozmIvOKCri1CQ03U6WHV3Og0ZhmtQBeKi-XwWK7ns3N0JZ37a97GvicdUcwINKebQrgJze0tcTWVryXb8qFrGOjCcwtJXy0Uil2ORRusn6CEYkUSDtFiYgaFyKXb_UMns-RjLtnPcHGxdrd-wlJjChkuoUFxgGzZ6NSaUoaCQCdKf-irfokuSftx5S1R-qh1gUmBf7_jEHS-cbA8_ks4VFBHHuglAHxepyMY%3D)
This isn’t a far-off, hypothetical agenda.

Some of these policies are already in motion, and they’re having devastating effects on lives and communities that need to be stopped before they get worse.

Major cities across the country are reporting double-digit increases in homicide rates this year as a result of the Democrats’ anti-police crusade, and rising crime is taking a toll on our streets.

**America is already suffering from the Left’s failed leadership – and it will only get worse if they hold onto Congress for two more years!**

That’s why Darin asked us to set a BIG goal for this month.

We need **1,000** individual donors to support our mission to keep Darin’s leadership in Washington so that he can keep fighting for the issues that matter to Illinois.

**Friend, can we count on you to get us one donor closer to our goal with a donation of any – and we mean ANY – amount?**

Some of these policies are already in motion, and they’re having devastating effects on lives and communities that need to be stopped before they get worse. Major cities across the country are reporting double-digit increases in homicide rates this year as a result of the Democrats’ anti-police crusade, and rising crime is taking a toll on our streets. America is already suffering from the Left’s failed leadership – and it will only get worse if they hold onto Congress for two more years! That’s why Darin asked us to set a BIG goal for this month. We need 1,000 individual donors to support our mission to keep Darin’s leadership in Washington so that he can keep fighting for the issues that matter to Illinois. Friend, can we count on you to get us one donor closer to our goal with a donation of any – and we mean ANY – amount? Thank you for your support, Team LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Perdue Files | Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: ❗️Jon’s opponent is “proud” of outsourcing jobs❗️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
He's only in it for himself. |
---
Friend,

Jon Ossoff's opponent, Sen. David Perdue, touts himself as a strong supporter of American small businesses. But in his business career, Perdue was anything but.

During a 2005 bankruptcy deposition, **Perdue said he spent most of his career outsourcing.**

When asked to defend it **years later**, he doubled down:

_"Defend it?**I'm proud of it!** "_ [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2667/5b2c1286/3ef3a51e/25f1fb63/2058838802/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_12_crpt_os") Friend, here's the truth. **David Perdue is not in politics to help American businesses. He's in it to help himself.**

Perdue stands alongside other corrupt, self-interested politicians in Washington, supporting policies that put the interests of huge multinational corporations ahead of mom-and-pop shops and other small businesses.

**Jon Ossoff's campaign to root out government corruption is a threat to Perdue's rich donors and self-serving allies, and they're running scared.**

_They're pouring MILLIONS into Perdue's campaign in a desperate attempt to save him._

**[Will you chip in today to power Jon's campaign to victory?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2667/5b2c1286/3ef3a51e/25f1fb63/2058838802/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_12_crpt_os")**

Folks, we’ve seen time and again that Tim Walberg can sit back and count on special interest dark money to fund his campaign. **But that’s not us.**

While he’s busy obstructing transparency and focused on pleasing his Washington insider friends, we’ve done the work here on the ground. We’ve talked to Michiganders about the changes they want to see in Washington.

**And, with your help, we can be that change. But that means we have to engage with as many voters as we possibly can in the coming days and weeks — and that costs money.**

[**_Folks, help us continue to do just that. Gretchen Driskell is running for Congress in Michigan's 7th district against incumbent Tim Walberg. As a nonpartisan mayor, Gretchen had to balance the budget, make tough decisions, and deliver results for people in our community. In Congress, she will bring that same leadership and start getting things done for all of us, here in Michigan.

clean_body: | | | This weekend, we have our August Weekend of Action — our coordinated (and virtual) effort to reach as many voters as we can before Election Day. You see, with less than 3 months until the election , it’s critical that we work every day to engage with Michigan voters. We’ve done a great job so far, but the closer we get to November 3rd, the more we rely on your help to spread our message. And to keep up our efforts, we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us put resources into events like this weekend’s to achieve our ultimate goal of flipping this seat. | If you’ve stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | | Folks, we’ve seen time and again that Tim Walberg can sit back and count on special interest dark money to fund his campaign. But that’s not us. While he’s busy obstructing transparency and focused on pleasing his Washington insider friends, we’ve done the work here on the ground. We’ve talked to Michiganders about the changes they want to see in Washington. And, with your help, we can be that change. But that means we have to engage with as many voters as we possibly can in the coming days and weeks — and that costs money. Thank you so much for being on this team — together, we can flip this seat! Gretchen Driskell P.S. There’s still time to join our Weekend of Action — Paid for by Gretchen Driskell for Congress Gretchen Driskell is running for Congress in Michigan's 7th district against incumbent Tim Walberg. name: Joe Biden
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
You are the driving force that can send Kamala and me to the White House to unite this nation and lead our country out of this mess. |
---
Peter --

Today, I am writing first and foremost to say thank you.

I have been entrusted with the duty to defeat Donald Trump in November. **And now, I have Kamala Harris joining me on the ticket to finish the job.**

Kamala brings to the ticket a fierce commitment to advocating for families, and there's no one I would rather fight alongside for the battle for the soul of this nation.

And we're here, Kamala and I, because of you, all of you. This campaign keeps moving forward because of every committed American who continues to keep the faith, even as Donald Trump takes a wrecking ball to all of our shared values and everything about our nation that we hold dear.

This is _your_ campaign, Peter. We want you here. We need you here. You have a place here. You have a home here.

But, Kamala and I have a long way to go. I've never believed beating Donald Trump would be easy, but we all know it is necessary. Every day as Trump fails to lead America through the COVID-19 crisis and places his own political agenda before the health and safety of the American public is a waking reminder of what is at stake in November.

[So, Peter, let's hit the ground running to win this monumental election. Grassroots supporters power this campaign, and I'm asking if you'll take the next step by chipping in $5 or any amount to own a piece of the campaign that will defeat Donald Trump. Are you in?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B2_jrb-welcome_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B2_jrb-welcome_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We will send a lot of messages to you, Peter, because you are our lifeblood. You are the driving force that can send Kamala and me to the White House to unite this nation and lead our country out of this mess.

It's a shot we only get this once, and with your unwavering support, we won't miss.

Our children and grandchildren will look back on this moment in history as a pivotal moment in the battle for the soul of America -- so let's not leave anything out on the field.

[**If you can spare it today, please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help the Biden-Harris team come out on top and make Donald Trump a one-term president:**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B2_jrb-welcome_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B2_jrb-welcome_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Thank you -- we're off to the races, Peter.

_Joe Biden_

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: School’s open…and funded
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb is committed to making sure that Indiana’s schools receive 100% of their funding | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

**"School is back in session, and as we've talked to schools around the state, there's a lot of excitement not just about connecting, but learning." – Gov. Holcomb**

Across the state, Hoosier students are back in school, with learning and safety as the cornerstones.

And whether that school is in-person, virtual, or a hybrid of the two, **Governor Holcomb is committed to making sure that Indiana’s schools receive 100% of their funding** – providing some consistency and certainty for our students, parents, and teachers.

And that includes a $182 million scheduled budget increase for K-12 schools in 2021.

**[WATCH: Governor Holcomb commits to 100% K-12 school funding>>](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=faa31fadf08843cca01b185563df149d&_e=UVq9jgwAbKDszpuLjFCrMHEuVWi12D6WRpXiiJDcze1yHkSPG3haPDlDbRD12A_DDGAWS3prHXicou_7p8aNBm5tQ0ULoujPaN7LM1ZmEnzECND56Gn_Edjfv0aZ_wuTexGWG8CbxCfm7XxackB9ZCmGCUeOpAJ3r730lE51a7xVjnsqEeCkBMGucmvWyv3ICYjkULY6V8uVOf1vQ6wg2tvp_2TmVBE57RZV4dEkhLGUs4Fp0Sx2qbokqSiaLYnBeUZqziaLR6hzTwR68zUdvrAdgMRNJWJYOV4B5Li6ZEKLndm0CdK3PoLuYNEfEdJ9ZBKvEz6tCPs6DrcE5yFgJZCv_hXQ3quiDStNa-lyOaKDnABXOcEST9WTMIn4j8BHZTkbQPb6_70mJl6TVu-hL5ox-yxrLRyiTkrnlERebWiFwc3E3aWPI5jwXgacFZf-N6eVJG7hVlB6bnO_NEDtr_NFyirF49VzzCH403iNaFU%3D)**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=faa31fadf08843cca01b185563df149d&_e=UVq9jgwAbKDszpuLjFCrMHEuVWi12D6WRpXiiJDcze1yHkSPG3haPDlDbRD12A_DDGAWS3prHXicou_7p8aNBm5tQ0ULoujPaN7LM1ZmEnzECND56Gn_Edjfv0aZ_wuTexGWG8CbxCfm7XxackB9ZCmGCUeOpAJ3r730lE51a7xVjnsqEeCkBMGucmvWyv3ICYjkULY6V8uVOf1vQ6wg2tvp_2TmVBE57RZV4dEkhLGUs4Fp0Sx2qbokqSiaLYnBeUZqziaLR6hzTwR68zUdvo0icAaNcdC3OeKmtCnADj6l7Eyxcs8-CYeleb5u5SpRW0aZ10fb5et-X0XWOHVWdskHPWf_buQu5nvweRuOa2ORNWTjWxUwxFc04IgsDLCou9VhigIohG4Zw9cbAB3enlzmxGo7IMHoeY0-7S5zRYyYTkOpfCry3vk8fJTX2fIQf9IVcLWmSu4QtRRPwVjeuHGEEJHLvWuqgwgYfxRSN0Q%3D)
This will be achieved by pushing back the official count of student enrollment to at least December, with the Indiana General Assembly returning for its annual session in January to continue the conversation.

**Governor Holcomb made this commitment clear today, just as he’s led with more school funding, more access, and greater educational opportunities throughout his administration – especially through this crisis.**

This includes:
* Grants for high-quality pre-K available in every Indiana county
* A historic $1.6 billion in new education funding since 2017
* 98% of Indiana school corporations reporting an increase in teacher pay last year with Governor Holcomb paying off a teacher pension liability
* PPE available to every Indiana district before school officially started
* Continual guidance from the Indiana State Department of Health

Governor Holcomb is continuing this commitment, but we need your help, too.

If you’re a parent, keep your child home if he or she is sick, or if they’re waiting on a COVID-19 test result.

If you’re a student, stick with a cohort of classmates, limiting the spread in the case of infection.

And for every Hoosier, let’s continue to wear our masks, wash our hands, and practice social distancing. It’s the difference-maker that keeps our businesses, schools, and economy going!

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew
