Holcomb Across the state, Hoosier students are back in school, with learning and safety as the cornerstones. And whether that school is in-person, virtual, or a hybrid of the two, Governor Holcomb is committed to making sure that Indiana’s schools receive 100% of their funding – providing some consistency and certainty for our students, parents, and teachers. And that includes a $182 million scheduled budget increase for K-12 schools in 2021. This will be achieved by pushing back the official count of student enrollment to at least December, with the Indiana General Assembly returning for its annual session in January to continue the conversation. Governor Holcomb made this commitment clear today, just as he’s led with more school funding, more access, and greater educational opportunities throughout his administration – especially through this crisis. This includes: Grants for high-quality pre-K available in every Indiana county A historic $1.6 billion in new education funding since 2017 98% of Indiana school corporations reporting an increase in teacher pay last year with Governor Holcomb paying off a teacher pension liability PPE available to every Indiana district before school officially started * Continual guidance from the Indiana State Department of Health Governor Holcomb is continuing this commitment, but we need your help, too. If you’re a parent, keep your child home if he or she is sick, or if they’re waiting on a COVID-19 test result. If you’re a student, stick with a cohort of classmates, limiting the spread in the case of infection. And for every Hoosier, let’s continue to wear our masks, wash our hands, and practice social distancing. It’s the difference-maker that keeps our businesses, schools, and economy going! #BackonTrack, -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: MJ Hegar
subject: We're done hoping that they'll rise to the occasion -- they won't.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e53/7f51f7bc/43428dee/4ef7f67a/1979319791/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

It's becoming clearer by the day that we need leaders with integrity at every level of government -- leaders who will put our country over politics, no matter what.

**Here 's the good news:** Across the country, servant leaders like **Sen. Gary Peters in Michigan, Cal Cunningham in North Carolina, Mark Kelly in Arizona, and Amy McGrath in Kentucky** are running for Senate. Candidates who, like me, served their country in uniform and take their oath of office seriously. | [ELECT LEADERS WITH INTEGRITY](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e53/7f51f7bc/43428dee/4ef7f679/1979319791/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4OTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-SenateVets?refcode=email_20200813.2nd__1896__&amount=10")
---
We know what it means to serve, and that's why we're **committed to restoring accountability in government.** We swore oaths to support and defend our Constitution, so we won't be pushed around by the special interests or DC bosses.

It's a far cry from what we're seeing from our opponents. They've supported gutting our health care, and now they won't even protect Americans during the biggest pandemic in generations. They refuse to respond to the crisis of gun violence. They took zero action when it turned out the administration had done nothing after learning our enemies put bounties on service members.

**We 're done hoping that they'll rise to the occasion -- they won't.**

**It won 't be easy.** All five of us are in competitive races, and we're all going to need your support to win in November. But y'all, each and every one of us faced some real tough challenges while serving our country, and we know how to rise to meet them.

So I'm asking you to join us in today's mission: **We need to raise as much as we can by midnight tonight to reach critical voters and fight back against the attacks from our do-nothing opponents, Mitch McConnell, and his Washington cronies.**
**Pitch in now:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: BREAKING: Trump Announces 'Historic Peace Agreement' Between Israel, UAE
body:
President Trump, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel, and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed agreed to the full normalization of relations | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=221332860c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: Trump Announces 'Historic Peace Agreement' Between Israel, UAE**

President Trump, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel, and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed—Crown Prince of Abu Dhabi and Deputy Supreme Commander of the United Arab Emirates—spoke this morning and agreed to the full normalization of relations between Israel and the UAE, Brooke Singman reports for Fox News.

“Everybody said this would be impossible,” President Trump said from the Oval Office. “This is a truly historic moment. Not since the Israel-Jordan peace treaty was signed more than 25 years ago has so much progress been made towards peace in the Middle East.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=73554ddd1f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “In 2017, President Trump signed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, which established Opportunity Zones to incentivize long-term investments in low-income communities nationwide . . . These new investments will lift approximately one million Americans from poverty, decreasing the poverty rate in Opportunity Zones by 11 percent,” HUD Secretary Ben Carson writes in [_The News-Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8aa0a0b349&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “Sick kids and their families cowered in fear inside a Chicago Ronald McDonald House as looters smashed the front door while trying to get inside this week . . . At least 13 cops were injured in violent clashes with looters, with 100 arrests. It started amid reports that a teen had been shot by cops, although police later said it was a 20-year-old man who had first fired at officers as he fled arrest,” Lee Brown reports in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9da51af8c0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Children with special needs “are going backwards” amid school closures and continuing lockdowns, said Fox News’ Rachel Campos-Duffy, who has a daughter with special needs. More than seven million of these students receive the bulk of support services at school—and when “schools are shut down, services are shut down.” Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f32b03db2&e=3ee4985eea).

🎬 [**WATCH: President Trump’s priority is to open our schools safely**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7a9aa1c5a0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e38b739ec4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5806d40421&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=21ca1a7db7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

_There’s no denying we’re making waves in the district — but our opponent is well-funded and giving us a run for our money._ **We’re talking to a lot of excited voters, but we need to be able to get our messages out to our entire district to win. That’s why our Mid-Month goal is so important.**

| | Dear Friend, Did you vote in a GA Primary Runoff Election? If so, how was your voting experience? What went well? What could be improved for the General Election? [**Can you fill out this quick form to give Fair Fight Action your feedback on voting?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa453/34a064cc/1bf8e233/702e282/3779889379/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScKbQsjJBpxHYDEuo4OD1btz98sNDjIGcMx7P3AnxobYyxs_w/viewform") There are just a few weeks until absentee ballots start going out in Georgia, and we are fighting on every front to improve Georgia voters' ability to cast their ballots and have them count. Your story is a key part of this effort. Understanding what happened in your county and with your ballot will help us fight for voters in your community and across the state. | Peter,
Good news \- exit polls show that we have jumped to an early lead!
But to secure the victory, I need you, your family, and all your friends to go out and vote!
Early voting is open throughout Lee and Collier from 10am to 6pm each day, but only through this Saturday.

| It is crucial that we finish strong. Here are some areas where I need your help:

* [Become a front-line precinct captain!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ka_M3Wow6aHkC1xmenZxda0523o3BILMqdLJQRocbQJhp3odBEO054cKWHZpS4RHezieR1dsis5xmw4v7rOOZdoKBb_y2vRt6yOWU0NdTm0wiiLilUGxtZVOUfJpzGH6YNpDInS8P9wJXtc-xU_qW9lymzSck7sOSEq8BjOVqdhHXtwlUOQTpw==&c=2cNrlIX9-02pz-0TM4FfgG9PdyR0AYbfiy-P4REBrdgxvjzmFxpABA==&ch=OE8Yqe-0nEwuJle8YJjQOSc2e4eBOxyqauLBkIWu5YMktzyPTXrB-A==)
* Tell everyone you know to vote for Dr. Fig!
* [Like us on Facebook and share my posts!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ka_M3Wow6aHkC1xmenZxda0523o3BILMqdLJQRocbQJhp3odBEO052dBsMsY9kRnbrf-To59dVf3P6FzsqgwBC2Q5xcYXWq0OZU3z8V2Rd-_9pPXb4ABv2ebTvqNW-SkrETVmQQdDuSBmmjotToO9vv2zDy_71ZD&c=2cNrlIX9-02pz-0TM4FfgG9PdyR0AYbfiy-P4REBrdgxvjzmFxpABA==&ch=OE8Yqe-0nEwuJle8YJjQOSc2e4eBOxyqauLBkIWu5YMktzyPTXrB-A==)

And of course, I need you to vote, whether it's through your absentee ballot, early voting, or on Election Day!
And when the final results roll in, I want YOU to be there to celebrate with me!

clean_body: But I need your vote to seal the deal | | | | | | | == | | Peter, Good news \- exit polls show that we have jumped to an early lead! But to secure the victory, I need you, your family, and all your friends to go out and vote! Early voting is open throughout Lee and Collier from 10am to 6pm each day, but only through this Saturday. | | | == | | | == | It is crucial that we finish strong. Here are some areas where I need your help: == Tell everyone you know to vote for Dr. Fig! * == And of course, I need you to vote, whether it's through your absentee ballot, early voting, or on Election Day! And when the final results roll in, I want YOU to be there to celebrate with me! | == | You're invited to my Victory Party at the Hyatt Regency Coconut Point Resort! | | | == | In this heavily-contested race, every dollar counts. If you have the means, I'm urging you to contribute to my campaign so that we can seal the deal for Southwest Florida. == | | | == | Now cast your vote, do your part, and make sure that everyone you know is voting for Dr. Fig. Let's do this! | == | == | Sincerely, Dr. William Figlesthaler Your Candidate for US Congress | | | | | | Paid for by William Figlesthaler for Congress | | Dr. Fig for Congress | 11216 North Tamiami Trail , Suite 542 , Naples, FL 34110 | | Sent by mailto:team@drfigforcongress.com powered by

name: Brian Mast
subject: Show Your Support for Fellow Patriot Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001seuna6_C-V3vuvMllhvZqkDo6LJDcz-FMveO0qpNTRs7T_zrbs4bcbGBt07M7WUAyGVxmNqW23dzFWKE4m8Z4gbhw7tswEcAjj6sHkGF61QgC6Zmy7I3oSZqUbuElOFo7pOCPtqURaJGCPsnmVZ-kjQ65fT0XgSBTlpPGkjpcLA1WgDzev3W9w==&c=Z7yHT1sKUQXC-ZgH1utsIjugi3KLcRFyXN3hHG4hdyirb1INgln4yA==&ch=314cPUyweXNz2DJoGhk0KAfHpVWUEqDFOChl4tAnn_fEvUkcShlgAg==)
---
| Peter,
After being blown up in Afghanistan, it became abundantly clear that I would no longer be an asset on the battlefield walking on prosthetics. But that wasn't going to stop me from serving our nation!
That's why, during my time in Congress, I have strived to use my platform to defend our country against enemies both foreign and domestic.
The same can be said for my colleague from our state's First District, Representative Matt Gaetz. Matt has always been an outspoken supporter of conservative values - consistently working to drain the Swamp from lobbyists with bad agendas, advocate on behalf of the American worker and fight back against anti-conservative bias.
With all the work he does to advance conservative causes in our country, let's support Matt so that he can keep fighting for us!
---
| | | [SUPPORT A FELLOW PATRIOT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001seuna6_C-V3vuvMllhvZqkDo6LJDcz-FMveO0qpNTRs7T_zrbs4bcbGBt07M7WUAyGVxmNqW23dzFWKE4m8Z4gbhw7tswEcAjj6sHkGF61QgC6Zmy7I3oSZqUbuElOFo7pOCPtqURaJGCPsnmVZ-kjQ65fT0XgSBTlpPGkjpcLA1WgDzev3W9w==&c=Z7yHT1sKUQXC-ZgH1utsIjugi3KLcRFyXN3hHG4hdyirb1INgln4yA==&ch=314cPUyweXNz2DJoGhk0KAfHpVWUEqDFOChl4tAnn_fEvUkcShlgAg==)
---
| Matt is a loyal defender of President Trump's agenda to Keep America Great, which might be why Nancy Pelosi and her cronies view him as one of their biggest enemies. For far-left liberals who want to reshape America to fit their radical vision, he is an obstacle in the way. They would like nothing more than to defeat him and replace him with one of their liberal puppets.
We need to make sure that doesn't happen! Can you pitch in and show him your support?

|

Peter, have you heard the BIG news?!?! **Kamala Harris is Joe Biden 's pick for Vice President of the United States!!** We couldn't be more THRILLED to have her on this HISTORY-making campaign. We're launching an ambitious goal and still need 5,658 grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours to support the Joe Biden and Kamala Harris ticket. **[_Will you show them you're on their team to defeat Trump in November?_](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0334/72412298/48c625d5/61061115/1110625784/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+show+them+youre+on+their+team+t&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4&source=VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4")** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0334/72412298/48c625d5/61061114/1110625784/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4&source=VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4") **Kamala is being hit by an onslaught of Republican attacks! The GOP promised to start BARRAGING her on DAY ONE -- and they've ALREADY delivered!** _We 've got to show we have her back in this moment up until Election Day._ [**Will you click here to support Joe and Kamala?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0334/72412298/48c625d5/61061117/1110625784/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+click+here+to+support+Joe+and+K&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4&source=VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4") | | | [Endorse Kamala + Joe NOW >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0334/72412298/48c625d5/61061116/1110625784/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Endorse+Kamala++Joe+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4&source=VPP_EM_EN_200813_KamalaVPa_U4_X4")

Happy to have you on the team!
\-- the Voter Protection Project

We noticed you haven’t engaged with one of our emails in a while -- no worries, we know there is a lot going on in the world! | | | [](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=d93f55eeeb354e3d88f8075e5dae436f&_e=GpayJ6Vlhs733Bv37JOepHkUyZ-KZve3dmw1V9a1OIKpogmkny1K2cAH6KXw9QvMY70DmrxE166GlfiOQpa4lEkGdXpA-7g_7KSDJnwc-ZyJ2JPMShfAehTGNjHZDJohh35WCkfFr1-hRhkdK81VeLXewzJctmIK5UMeXp0wMUuehnwUAq6Z0oVm0tke1UypwmDHrDTRASlCYeu0XUwvCy_yGmPBIbyBzysn49oHglTEN8bKOhg2JaMuHM72BKu0DFRUbtznorwFk7j9i34VCHNwNVW_pZ_H-ar-OyNkMfUdTLHqHPdaB6tnoDL-fK-2) Hi there, we wanted to check in! name: Patty Murray
subject: This is our plan to flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
We know that defeating President Trump isn't enough -- we have to take back the Senate.
And with only 82 days to go until Election Day, we need to be sure we're ready to win this fight. My Sprint to 2020 program is supporting Democratic candidates in must-win races across the country -- and I urgently need your help elect and re-elect these incredible Democrats.
**[The fight for the Senate -- and our future -- hinges on key races in states like Montana, Texas, and Georgia. Will you pitch in $5 now to help flip these red seats blue?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200812-senateslate?refcode=em200812i_452&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Gov. Steve Bullock is running for Senate in Montana because he understands that people in his state want real leaders working for them -- not partisan rubber-stamps. He's building a strong campaign that can reach enough voters to flip this state, but he needs us to have his back.
Texas is another state to watch in this election. Democrats almost won a Senate seat here in 2018 -- and this year, MJ Hegar is poised to finally turn Texas blue with our support. In fact, the latest poll shows she's only down by one point to GOP Senator John Cornyn in this crucial race.
And in Georgia, we're working hard to elect Rev. Raphael Warnock -- a renowned pastor, social justice advocate, and champion for his state. _The Washington Post_ just called this one of the most competitive 2020 Senate races -- and with our help, he can win this fight in November.
**[Can you contribute $5 or more now to help elect Democrats Steve Bullock in Montana, MJ Hegar in Texas, and Raphael Warnock in Georgia?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200812-senateslate?refcode=em200812i_452&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200812-senateslate?refcode=em200812i_452&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f0/18e32a7f/4dcd6084/7b211d0c/2732946760/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f0/18e32a7f/4dcd6084/7b211d0d/2732946760/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f0/18e32a7f/4dcd6084/7b211d02/2732946760/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f0/18e32a7f/4dcd6084/7b211d0e/2732946760/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f0/18e32a7f/4dcd6084/7b211d08/2732946760/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f0/18e32a7f/4dcd6084/7b211d03/2732946760/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

body:
Together, we will defy voter suppression. |
---
Hi friend,

Did you see Jon Ossoff's message on Tuesday?

**We're launching a Voter Protection Fund to mobilize and protect voters so every eligible Georgian can vote.**

We know Georgia is the frontline state in the fight against voter suppression. Together, we will defy this disenfranchisement and expand the right to vote so we can send Jon to the Senate to pass a new Voting Rights Act.

**[Right now, will you chip in $10 to our Voter Protection Fund?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e265d/5b2c1286/3ef60749/25f18631/1602343950/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?refcode=em_2020_08_13_vpf2&amount=10")**

Ellen Foster
Campaign Manager
Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** August 11, 2020
**Subject:** Friend, voter suppression should be a crime

Friend,

Voter suppression should be a crime.

**As we speak, Georgia's election authorities are taking steps to make it harder for all eligible citizens to vote.**

Here's the deal, friend: I am neck and neck in the polls with GOP Senator David Perdue, and this race is becoming the most competitive in the country.

**With a race this tight, voter suppression could be the difference between whether I win and go to Washington to fight for _you_ \-- or whether David Perdue gets another six years.**

My campaign is focused on expanding the right to vote and fighting voter suppression, but I need your help to do it.

Congressman John Lewis and I launched my Senate campaign together with a Voter Registration Rally. **And when I arrive in Washington, I will honor his memory by championing passage of a new Voting Rights Act so every citizen's sacred right to vote is protected.**

**[Today, can you contribute $20 to our Voter Protection Fund? With 12 weeks to go until Election Day, we're hard at work mobilizing and protecting voters so that every eligible Georgian can vote, and vote safely.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e265d/5b2c1286/3ef60749/25f18636/1602343950/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?refcode=em_2020_08_13_vpf2&amount=20")**

---
Friend, nowhere is the fight against voter suppression more important than in my state of Georgia.

What happened during our June Primary -- with understaffed, overcrowded polling places with hours-long waits -- was _an affront to the principles of our Constitution_.

Governor Brian Kemp and Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger administered an election that disproportionately disenfranchised Black and working-class voters.

_And just last week, Raffensperger tried to convince DeKalb County not to send absentee ballot requests to all voters._

**We cannot permit cynical politicians to abuse their power and disenfranchise American citizens.**

They don't want us to be able to vote by mail. They want us to have to wait in long lines to exercise our right to vote. They want to discourage us. They want us to give up.

We won't give up. _We are fighting back._

**We're going to defy their voter suppression, win this election, and pass a new Voting Rights Act that will make voter suppression a federal crime.**

**[Please, chip in $20 to our Voter Protection Fund. Friend, with just 12 weeks to go, we can't afford to wait.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e265d/5b2c1286/3ef60749/25f18636/1602343950/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?refcode=em_2020_08_13_vpf2&amount=20")**
| [Chip in $20 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e265d/5b2c1286/3ef60749/25f18636/1602343950/VEsHAw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?refcode=em_2020_08_13_vpf2&amount=20")
---
The struggle continues.

With love,

Jon

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Let me explain, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[Peter, can you donate $5 before the mid-August deadline?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-august-2020?refcode=em200812i_925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Lately, we have all been excited about polls across the country that show Democrats on the verge of flipping red Senate seats blue in states like Kansas, North Carolina, and Texas.
But I wanted to take a minute to explain why our race in Illinois is just as important -- and why your support for my re-election campaign is vital in the fight to take back the Senate.
While these competitive races deserve our attention, we can't grow complacent about defending our Democratic seats. Our opponents are counting on us to lose sight of races like this one in Illinois. In fact, my so-called "independent" opponent wrote himself a $5 million dollar check in an effort to buy a seat in Mitch McConnell's Senate. And if we don't stand strong in Illinois and defend this seat -- our math won't add up in our fight to win a Democratic Senate.
**[That's why I am setting a $15,000 fundraising goal -- and I need your help to get there by August 16. Can I count on you to step up and show your support before the deadline?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-august-2020?refcode=em200812i_925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Peter, I may not be able to "self-fund" my campaign with multi-million dollar checks -- but I have something even better. I have supporters like you who have always had my back and who are standing with me in the fight to keep this Democratic Senate seat in Illinois.
These goals are so important for our campaign -- and I appreciate all of your support in this race. You are our secret weapon -- and the reason we will not only win big in Illinois, but flip the Senate and finally end the reign of Mitch McConnell and the Republican majority in the Senate.
**[We need to send a message to Mitch McConnell and prove that we're ready to flip the Senate, Peter. Please pitch in $5 now toward my fundraising goal.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-august-2020?refcode=em200812i_925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-august-2020?refcode=em200812i_925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff42b2/42ab3cf4/673c26de/135d056e/3356423935/VEsA/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Why they’re attacking me
body:
We won't be stopped
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,
This week, my opponents started running more than $150,000 in negative attack ads against me.
Why?
Because we are winning.
I was raised to believe that when someone attacks you, it's because they are scared or insecure.
In politics, I have learned that when one candidate or their surrogates attack another, it's because they don't have the merits to stand on their own.
As the leading candidate in this race, I have become the number one target for false attacks and attempted character assassination.
The baseless accusations that are landing in folk's text messages, mailboxes and tv screens are #FAKENEWS.
My opponents and their surrogates are scared and lashing out.
They are scared that we have raised our money from local people in the district - not personal slush accounts or trust funds.
They are scared because we have more endorsements from local leaders than anyone else in this race.
They are scared that the positive polling results for Team Kat and the torrent of momentum is going to be unstoppable.
And they would be right. We will not be stopped. We have a nation to save.
While these guys have been busy slinging mud and trying to buy your vote, we've been staying focused on the issues that matter and working to earn your vote.
So if you are like me and are more concerned with stopping The Squad and saving our nation from socialism, then join Team Kat and vote early or on August 18th.
Thank you for your consideration,
---
|
---
|
Kat Cammack Constitutional conservative candidate for Congress, FL-03
P.S. If you have any questions or would like to talk with me directly, please feel free to call or text me on my personal cell phone - (352) 359-5070. I look forward to hearing from you.
---

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9e6f26363d2cf8daf975935272a4717a326e8778097ea7515d6da002cc844bb160b26cdbd8b84e099aad5b5bb3bcc8fd576fbe46a46ee34d

Friend,

subject: Re: Republican obstructionism
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kgpdaLdgxlnJcG6yd1RTh70KvR2YiqRYpbLHEZpmIEk=/hc9lwKslHzyySseM6vlVC_w0IywN4ZxTTHkG2xrvs98=?refcode=081320Olson)
| | Friend, Did you see Melissa's email? I can't believe the rate things are devolving with Minnesota Republicans. This petty and cruel attack against one of our state's most effective female leaders is completely unacceptable. I'm fired up and ready to work day and night for the next 81 days to make sure we protect and expand our House DFL Majority and flip the Minnesota Senate. If you are too, please consider investing in our campaign today. [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kgpdaLdgxlnJcG6yd1RTh70KvR2YiqRYpbLHEZpmIEk=/hc9lwKslHzyySseM6vlVC_w0IywN4ZxTTHkG2xrvs98=?refcode=081320Olson) It's time for us to all come together around our shared values and end Republicans' divisive and petty politics once and for all. Thank you, Rep. Liz Olson Majority Whip Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kgpdaLdgxlnJcG6yd1RTh70KvR2YiqRYpbLHEZpmIEk=/hc9lwKslHzyySseM6vlVC_w0IywN4ZxTTHkG2xrvs98=?refcode=081320Olson) \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Melissa Hortman** <house@dflhouse.com>
Date: Thu, Aug 13, 2020 at 12:46 PM
Subject: Republican obstructionism Friend, During my time in public service, I've never seen such reprehensible behavior as I witnessed yesterday in the Minnesota Senate. Republicans took a swipe at Governor Walz and ousted his strong and effective Commissioner of Labor and Industry with no notice.**Senate Republicans can equivocate all they want, but there is no way to escape the fact that they ousted Commissioner Leppink out of pure spite.** During the legislative session, Commissioner Leppink aced Senate Republicans in budget negotiations, giving us the strongest wage theft law in the country - protecting workers across the state. They've had a bone to pick with her ever since. **The Republican House Minority Leader even described it as "executing a prisoner****" yesterday on Twitter. **This is the latest and most extreme example of Minnesota Republicans choosing to be vindictive at the expense of the people they are supposed to be serving. Republicans are intent on playing politics instead of following science and data in responding to the COVID pandemic. They have continually attempted to restrict Governor Walz's ability to respond to the pandemic on behalf of Minnesotans, and are now blocking one of his administration's top officials from doing her job. Minnesota Republicans are in lockstep with Donald Trump, choosing petty politics instead of helping Minnesotans. Will you contribute to our campaign today to make sure this cruel act against an effective woman leader doesn't go unanswered? [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kgpdaLdgxlnJcG6yd1RTh70KvR2YiqRYpbLHEZpmIEk=/hc9lwKslHzyySseM6vlVC_w0IywN4ZxTTHkG2xrvs98=?refcode=081320Olson) Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kgpdaLdgxlnJcG6yd1RTh70KvR2YiqRYpbLHEZpmIEk=/hc9lwKslHzyySseM6vlVC_w0IywN4ZxTTHkG2xrvs98=?refcode=081320Olson)

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Peter, do you Back the Blue?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Let's send a strong message to America's police officers that we have their backs. Crime is surging in Democrat-controlled cities as liberal leaders allow the mob to take control. Sign My Petition: Add your name here to support our law enforcement officers.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxOTM3OTMS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTExODI2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Our police officers are under attack.

In Seattle, the city's police chief has been forced to resign after the liberal city council defunded the police force. Seattle's leaders care more about appeasing the mob than keeping their citizens safe.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxOTM3OTMS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTExODI2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Even worse, this story is starting to play out across the country. Crime is surging in Democrat-controlled cities as liberal leaders allow the mob to take control.

Police officers' jobs are already dangerous enough. It will only get worse as liberal leaders declare war on law enforcement.

What's happening is a tragedy because it can be stopped.

[**Sign My Petition: Add your name here to support our law enforcement officers.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxOTM3OTMS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTExODI2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Let's send a strong message to all the rioters and Democrat-controlled cities that we still **Ba****ck the blue**.

We don't have to let the liberal mob win and plunge our country into violence and anarchy. Instead, let's give our law enforcement the encouragement they need.

[**Peter, add your name here to support our law enforcement officers.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxOTM3OTMS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTExODI2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

I hope you will stand with me and **Back the Blue**.

In service,
****
****
****
Tom Cotton **
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxOTM3OTMS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTExODI2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

subject: The understatement of the year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
So much has changed about how we are ... |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=157b96027e&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Hey -
It’s a huge understatement to say this year is like no other. The pandemic has affected us all on so many levels, and it’s affecting the election as well. Fears of election day voting issues because of COVID-19 are encouraging more and more people to vote by absentee ballot or participate in early voting which is changing the game for campaigns. **In this year's primary, in our district, over 61% of voters voted by mail-in ballot or participated in early voting.**
---
| [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=3f2f75bea5&e=e25784ff28)
---
| Absentee ballots will be mailed out September 15th, so our timeline is much shorter than in years past. In just a few weeks, ballots will arrive in mailboxes, land on kitchen tables and voting will begin.

That's why we [need your support NOW](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=5aa1b08a0e&e=e25784ff28) to reach these critical voters.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Let's talk about USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

I wanted to take a few minutes to write to you about the Post Office.

The U.S. Postal Service has been in the news a lot over the past few months, between President Trump's misleading comments on mail-in voting, to cuts being made to our postal service by the Trump administration appointee who is now leading the agency.

Let me be frank: USPS was never meant to be a huge moneymaker for the federal government. It was created more than 200 years ago to **_serve_** the American public -- **_service is in the name_**.

Millions of folks across the country rely on the U.S. Postal Service to receive their Social Security checks, get important medicine, and stay in touch with their loved ones. And come November, many more Americans will use this system to safely cast their ballots by mail. Beyond the critical services it provides, the U.S. Postal Service also employs 600,000 folks across the country, and questions about funding means their jobs hang in the balance.

We're going to need Congressional action to fix this. If you feel the same way I do about protecting the Post Office, **[I urge you to sign onto this petition to show your support](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db46/53d9897e/543dce05/1c882c15/1683925018/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-usps")**.

USPS isn't something that we can do without, even in the digital age. I will continue to advocate in the Senate to make sure the postal service has the funding it needs to continue to serve the American people. That's a promise.

Thank you for your support.

-- Mark Warner
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db46/53d9897e/543dce05/1c882c14/1683925018/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200813_p_1_fl__708__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db46/53d9897e/543dce05/1c882c13/1683925018/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Three Delays And Counting, Democrats Play Politics With COVID Relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Three Delays and Counting**
_Democrats Delay Coronavirus Aid to Promote Liberal Agenda_

Over the past six months, Democrats have consistently delayed support for our small businesses and first responders to fund their liberal pet projects. Their political priorities have been obvious from the beginning, with Whip Clyburn, one of the senior-most Democrats in Congress, even calling the coronavirus "a tremendous opportunity to restructure things to fit our vision." Sadly, Representative Lizzie Fletcher has once again fallen in line with her party and allowed these partisan political games to jeopardize the relief our small businesses need.

Let's take a look at some of Pelosi's most blatant attempts to delay coronavirus relief:

**1. In March, Speaker Pelosi blocked funding for the Strategic Petroleum Reserve, a lifeline for Houston's Energy Corridor, and delayed the CARES Act to promote her liberal agenda.**
Even before the passage of the CARES Act in March, Pelosi was maneuvering to rewrite our economy and shore up liberal agenda items unrelated to the coronavirus crisis. In late March, Pelosi delayed stimulus negotiations and instead pushed a $2.5 trillion bill more focused on promoting the _Green New Deal_ than helping American families.

**2. In April, Pelosi delayed aid to small businesses to try to leverage divergent priorities.**
When small businesses urgently needed support and millions of Americans were losing their jobs, Pelosi again delayed aid. Rather than approve a targeted $250 billion replenishment of funds for small businesses, Pelosi stalled for two weeks and tried to hamper small business relief with billions of dollars for other priorities.

**3. In August, Pelosi still refuses to budge on her $3.4 trillion liberal wish list.**
Just days ago, Pelosi doubled down on a $3.4 trillion top line for relief funding, an unreachable price tag underpinned by a divisive, liberal political agenda that includes more funding for _Green New Deal _priorities, billions of dollars for illegal immigrants, and zero support for Houston's Energy Corridor.

While Pelosi may have all the time in the world to push her agenda, American families bearing the brunt of the coronavirus do not. We need leaders who will act decisively in times of need, not play politics.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=9749238e5d534215aebfac4f245fc098&_e=aPHqO8CbAKAW3H4JptPOv14doU7fEy_JuOclmN3zrjtCYme1BkieYJisEJUvGxFfidaI8sex77Gabv6gN5hv6_xtapVn2lYwcneEd9TBnND1aPE2ev2Y6RGHTI4LbXHaN71WGXPLLT2x0rDhqJ3S0FwrTHpOztqiikUJddTnAYu19xdWFL-Pe8NBrR-uiOeDjTfDFILnNZ72LVHvOuvtJJ7tIdFL1qzUZ4Qqmj_qje_rpgaQn9Z51_tkpy-NXLJip56E2G-vUNBK6p5tmVWLCQAuP6Oj7wMNVeKdGZmBTLc%3D)****

subject: Team Collins Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Dear Friend,

I don't know about you but I think we are all getting tired of hearing Kelly Loeffler lie to Georgians. To date, Sen. Loeffler's team has attempted to pull the wool over the eyes of conservatives like yourself, to avoid answering the tough questions. She's using her millions to try and cover up her record as a pro-choice, anti-2nd Amendment never-Trumper who has no trouble shelling out money to Maxine Waters and other radical liberals.

That's why we need your help today. We can't let Kelly and her minions mislead Georgians any longer. We have to remind them who the true conservative in this race is.

CLICK HERE TO HELP US CONTACT VOTERS AND LET THEM KNOW TO VOTE FOR DOUG COLLINS. (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins)

Sincerely,

Will Smith

Political Director
Collins for Senate, Inc.
ICYMI: Doug Collins on Facebook Live (https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=670483810209086&ref=watch_permalink)
Doug Collins speaks to Georgians and answers questions about the race and the issues affecting the nation.
Click here to watch! (https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=670483810209086&ref=watch_permalink)
https://www.facebook.com/DougCollinsforSenate/videos/670483810209086

**
Last Week on the Campaign Trail
------------------------------------------------------------
Big thank you to Appalachian Gun & Pawn in Jasper for hosting Doug lats week!

Team Collins was out in force on Saturday all over Georgia! Great to see a friend and supporter, Sheriff Janice Mangum of Jackson Co.

Whether it's joining Doug at an upcoming event, contacting voters, or putting up a yard sign, we need your help! Visit our website (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins) or email us at grassroots@dougforgeorgia.com.

============================================================
DOUG IN THE NEWS
** Doug Collins Rallies Supporters In Gwinnett County (https://www.gwinnettdailypost.com/local/u-s-rep-doug-collins-calls-on-gwinnett-republicans-for-support-in-senate-special-election/article_1622e5ea-d661-11ea-9e58-bf110db924d5.html)
"We've got to get out and do something," Collins said. "I do not want to see Republicans on Nov. 4 say I wish I had. There's not another Republican who, on Nov. 4, wants to say I wish I had put out one more sign, I wish I had made on more phone call.."

"Kelly is a phony," spokesman Dan McLagan told The Daily Beast in an email. " She was a quiet little corporate liberal who was fine with flag protests and diversity slogans until she fell behind in her Senate race."

** For the full story click here. (https://www.thedailybeast.com/from-taxes-to-blm-kelly-loeffler-abandons-past-moderation)

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Peter, I'm asking

body:
Wow. That's all I can say. |
---
Peter --

Wow. That's all I can say. It's been two days since Joe asked me to join him as his running mate, and they have been incredible.

Last night, I had my first grassroots fundraiser with Joe, and hearing from grassroots supporters like you filled me with hope. To see how many people are standing with Joe and me was incredible, and Peter, I promise not to let you down.

Because there is so much on the line in this election. And as Joe says, it's about fighting for the soul of this nation. From now until November 3, I will do everything I can to earn the vote of Americans across the country.

And Peter, I hope you'll be by my side. I see you haven't chipped in yet to become a Founding Donor of the Biden-Harris ticket yet. A donation of $5 is all it takes! [Can I count on your support today?](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B3_kdh-fd_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B3_kdh-fd_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

America is crying out for leadership, yet we have a president who cares more about himself than the people who elected him -- a president who is making every challenge we face even more difficult to solve.

Right now, America needs action. In the midst of a pandemic, Donald Trump is trying to rip health care away from those who need it most.

America is in crisis, and I know Joe Biden will lead us out of it. But first, he needs your support to get to the White House.

[So Peter, chip in to become a Founding Donor to the Biden-Harris campaign today >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B3_kdh-fd_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B3_kdh-fd_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thank you for your support,
Kamala

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bba8/1cd0ac28/1621128c6/357e1c96/4275187243/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bba8/1cd0ac28/1621128c6/357e1c95/4275187243/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bba8/1cd0ac28/1621128c6/357e1c93/4275187243/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bba8/1cd0ac28/1621128c6/357e1c92/4275187243/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bba8/1cd0ac28/1621128c6/357e1c91/4275187243/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bba8/1cd0ac28/1621128c6/357e1c94/4275187243/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bba8/1cd0ac28/1621128c6/357e1c8f/4275187243/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: Follow the money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Something is fishy with Sen. Cornyn's bill.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e5d/7f51f7bc/435998aa/4ef7f9fb/3567996903/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, whenever we see Sen. Cornyn pushing a fishy bill that doesn't benefit everyday Texans, MJ always says **" follow the money."** Instead of focusing on helping small businesses and those who are doing their best, Sen. Cornyn's proposed "liability shield" bill is designed to protect negligent businesses that fail to protect their workers from COVID-19. It's clearly not a bill to help the essential workers keeping Texas running -- so who is it for?

**Follow the money:** Sen. Cornyn and Majority Leader Mitch McConnell have raked in a combined **$1.2 million** from the special interests that are trying to push this bill through, including the gun lobby and Big Pharma. They bankroll Sen. Cornyn, so he protects their bottom line.

**But this isn 't how Congress should work. [Help us change the system and elect MJ to get our government working for the people again.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e5d/7f51f7bc/435998aa/4ef7f9fa/3567996903/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200813.3nd__1921__&amount=10")**

Our elections should be decided by the people -- not by deep-pocketed special interests. That's why, since the day this campaign launched, MJ hasn't accepted a cent from corporate PACs.

**Together we can defeat Sen. Cornyn and the big-money interests desperate to keep him in office. Can we count on you?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: School Edition: Dr. Fauci
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Since the day Rhode Island saw our very first case of COVID-19, I've tried to follow two principles: (1) focus on facts not frenzy and (2) listen to the experts. Every decision we've made in response to this pandemic has been guided by science, data, and the advice of public health experts. As we approach the start of the school year, I know that parents, teachers, students and administrators are feeling uncertainty and anxiety about what the next few months hold. I understand that. But I want you to know that we are going to take the same approach to reopening schools that we have to every other obstacle we've faced during this crisis. We're going to follow the science and the data and if we're not confident that we are ready to safely reopen schools, we won't. For the past few weeks, Education Commissioner Angelica Infante-Green and I have been hearing from districts that they need a little more time to operationalize their safety plans. So yesterday, we announced that we will delay the start of the school year until September 14th. And today I was joined by one of the most reliable and trusted public health leaders in the world, Dr. Anthony S. Fauci, to discuss the health benefits of in-person learning and the precautions that need to be in place for us to be confident in the safety of our schools. You can watch the video of our conversation by clicking on the link below:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k7LgOjTjclK-dH6efBVfo-DDv4MPJth0YhbxzOoqbQWRYi_lIy_ZKYza003aLVuC49u7f1kC9vdEw5mpbheEP9HBRuvqeC3HTkTH-YQoDGKPlIhQsn-GhhlZZccwPyzuCK9FgSz5nZV9dgAOmgPC6FxcAeitUbhbRqL3-OQGLjcwvPREg3AbV1bLiPtYpzzV&c=vUxx4PHUhHdyaO4j5cGedZ3QzbonuvKDBYh5Xs6h3_m_dVrIEAlRlA==&ch=zXmX_y6NWjdDt7dyiVqwMWAXr_VsTx_ubXTY-_HMTMzxZtxvsW3czw==)
---
| You can also watch the video on [YouTube](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k7LgOjTjclK-dH6efBVfo-DDv4MPJth0YhbxzOoqbQWRYi_lIy_ZKYza003aLVuCKN9jjI8AizuAJwp3keXDqSR0UocJ99rQJu3VIIUulerOEsEhnFheOCqCj1r7FRPdArwHjKPdzxSqIzjUKY72-A==&c=vUxx4PHUhHdyaO4j5cGedZ3QzbonuvKDBYh5Xs6h3_m_dVrIEAlRlA==&ch=zXmX_y6NWjdDt7dyiVqwMWAXr_VsTx_ubXTY-_HMTMzxZtxvsW3czw==) or on [CapitolTV](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k7LgOjTjclK-dH6efBVfo-DDv4MPJth0YhbxzOoqbQWRYi_lIy_ZKZpQ7fY_HDknVQuTpXBzo64R1tGd4e550LUoaCtpMmk7lWCmEKb1BwbXcj-YdYsWPS0kttoRfDmNNrdS_vsjvfbky22rLwEMpdt0SAyQXoT5Qm2ihik5g53ahogcThONlJ5DKRUJRLE1&c=vUxx4PHUhHdyaO4j5cGedZ3QzbonuvKDBYh5Xs6h3_m_dVrIEAlRlA==&ch=zXmX_y6NWjdDt7dyiVqwMWAXr_VsTx_ubXTY-_HMTMzxZtxvsW3czw==).
---
| I'm incredibly grateful to have had the opportunity to ask Dr. Fauci what he thinks about our decision to push back school reopening, where we need to be on testing, and if we're in a safe position to consider in-person learning. I also asked him some of the more than 500 questions that Rhode Islanders emailed me last weekend. We'll continue to follow the advice of experts as we work to keep our teachers and students safe this fall. I know that this challenge can feel daunting, but I believe--as does Dr. Fauci--that if we stick to the rules and work together, we can do this for Rhode Island. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k7LgOjTjclK-dH6efBVfo-DDv4MPJth0YhbxzOoqbQWRYi_lIy_ZKfY1JtzT0xEGEpus9GxYZBLkAFPuuI_HJtnl4jPAiIbrheD6tSqNP5Fp1s_I6_JNuc8rqQOsvBRp3dwZPT_CIdNxEYJrwxCv7IcMzAKqKN-4dMWmzIgXiupXVow6gs1KhSkJWCTHIVScQq5wbEFdx4U=&c=vUxx4PHUhHdyaO4j5cGedZ3QzbonuvKDBYh5Xs6h3_m_dVrIEAlRlA==&ch=zXmX_y6NWjdDt7dyiVqwMWAXr_VsTx_ubXTY-_HMTMzxZtxvsW3czw==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k7LgOjTjclK-dH6efBVfo-DDv4MPJth0YhbxzOoqbQWRYi_lIy_ZKfY1JtzT0xEGEpus9GxYZBLkAFPuuI_HJtnl4jPAiIbrheD6tSqNP5Fp1s_I6_JNuc8rqQOsvBRp3dwZPT_CIdNxEYJrwxCv7IcMzAKqKN-4dMWmzIgXiupXVow6gs1KhSkJWCTHIVScQq5wbEFdx4U=&c=vUxx4PHUhHdyaO4j5cGedZ3QzbonuvKDBYh5Xs6h3_m_dVrIEAlRlA==&ch=zXmX_y6NWjdDt7dyiVqwMWAXr_VsTx_ubXTY-_HMTMzxZtxvsW3czw==).
---
| P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k7LgOjTjclK-dH6efBVfo-DDv4MPJth0YhbxzOoqbQWRYi_lIy_ZKYza003aLVuC5--jyGCf19qVXOB3QDM3lSs6FdJZF02-Ct0_Dn-0IG-34tXIAjHWXcnU-TGjxcxQ_jdnn11iRiN56Jxo0Erm_7uzGxcikRgKmIrLFs23yUWP62b656-xafAkcNeWSLX3OtOrvODYkwk-Pm5uQ6HZp58iVOynlEGSs_Y4IccpDLfPz_mAyCaIPwz65ty57kipevDeJxu8Nbid6Uh1P4KBY52eGtKApjFYOjfWRmWjNl3hY4bCs4en_i8dp25CJcko-O3rGFxQfEA=&c=vUxx4PHUhHdyaO4j5cGedZ3QzbonuvKDBYh5Xs6h3_m_dVrIEAlRlA==&ch=zXmX_y6NWjdDt7dyiVqwMWAXr_VsTx_ubXTY-_HMTMzxZtxvsW3czw==).
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How today’s historic Middle East agreement happened
body:
This morning, President Trump officially secured the first agreement to normalize relations between Israel and a major Arab country in decades. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bc3ce8c00&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 13, 2020
---
| | |
# **How today’s historic Middle East agreement happened**

**This morning, President Trump** officially secured the first agreement to normalize relations between Israel and a major Arab country in decades.

**“Just a few moments** ago, I hosted a very special call with two friends—Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel and Crown Prince Mohammed bin Zayed of the United Arab Emirates—where they agreed to finalize a historical peace agreement,” President Trump announced. “Everybody said this would be impossible.”

**The United Arab Emirates** becomes the first major Arab state to recognize Israel since the Israel-Jordan Peace Treaty was signed on October 26, 1994. Today’s action is the most significant step toward peace in the Middle East in more than 25 years.

🎬 [**Watch: President Trump announces historic Middle East deal**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c331dbfb5&e=3ee4985eea)

**How did it happen?** For the past three and half years, President Trump built trust with our regional allies and changed their strategic calculus. He identified shared interests and common opportunities, moving them away from perpetuating old conflicts**.**

**“You can’t solve problems** that have gone unsolved by doing it the same way that people before you have tried and failed,” Advisor to the President Jared Kushner said.

**When President Trump** took office in 2017, there was tremendous unrest across the Middle East. Iran’s aggression was being felt throughout the region. ISIS’ caliphate had grown to the size of Ohio. Many of America’s crucial regional allies felt abandoned.

**📖****READ** : [**Joint Statement of the United States, Israel, and the UAE**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=959bb69c93&e=3ee4985eea)

**The Trump Administration** went right to work building trust:
* **The ISIS caliphate** was destroyed, and terrorist leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi was brought to justice.

* **After decades** of past U.S. presidents promising on the campaign trail to move the U.S. Embassy in Israel to Jerusalem—only to break that promise once in office—President Trump made it happen.

* **After nearly two decades of war,** America under President Trump is bringing troops home from the Middle East. In February, the United States reached a historic agreement with the Taliban that secured important commitments necessary to finally end the conflict in Afghanistan responsibly.

**Here at home,** the President’s commitment to energy independence has made America less dependent on foreign oil—bolstering our national security, lifting our economy, and improving U.S. foreign policy in the process.

**“What we see today** is a new Middle East,” U.S. Special Representative for Iran Brian Hook said. “The trend lines are very different today.”

🎬 [**Jared Kushner: We’ve made historic strides toward peace**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=441753c40e&e=3ee4985eea)

**Now, opening direct ties between** two of the Middle East’s most dynamic economies, Israel and the UAE, will transform the region by spurring economic growth, enhancing technological innovation, and forging closer people-to-people relations.

**“They’re the two most capable** countries in the Middle East—two very capable, very skilled, very innovative allies of the United States,” National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien said. “So it’s great for Israel, it’s great for the UAE, but it’s also great for . . . the American people.”

**Today’s historic agreement** has been named the Abraham Accord. “Abraham, as many of you know, was the father of all three great faiths. He is referred to as ‘Abraham’ in the Christian faith, ‘Ibrahim’ in the Muslim faith, and ‘Avraham’ in the Jewish faith,” U.S. Ambassador to Israel David Friedman said in the Oval Office today.

**“No person better symbolizes** the potential for unity among all these three great faiths than Abraham.”

🎬 [**President Trump: Progress is happening that no one thought possible**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a309bef42&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [**The President knew it was time for a new approach to peace**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=66b5c5090b&e=3ee4985eea)

Today’s action is the most significant step toward peace in the Middle East in more than 25 years. 🎬 How did it happen? For the past three and half years, President Trump built trust with our regional allies and changed their strategic calculus.
